title: Days of Hope
writer: Max Aub, André Malraux, Denis Marion
actors: Andrés Mejuto, Nicolás Rodríguez, José Santpere
plot: 1937, during the spanish civil war, at Teruel. The fight of the Republicans (with very poor means but high commitment) against fascist army of General Franco. Can be seen as romanticized witness of director and writer Andre Malrau...
